title: [lora_l2.c:319-322] rx_buf BUILD_ASSERT message is confusing
description:
Round 2 gap analysis: Missed because focus was on runtime bugs, not documentation quality.

The BUILD_ASSERT at lines 320-322 has a confusing message. The message says rx_buf must *equal* LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD, which it does (255 == 255). But the *intent* is to document that callbacks can receive up to 255 bytes. The assertion itself is correct but the message could be clearer that this is about establishing a contract for callback implementers.

Minor documentation/clarity issue - not a bug.
close_reason: Fixed: clarified BUILD_ASSERT message to indicate callbacks may receive up to 255 bytes
